server.name: Prasad Gade Portfolio Static Discovery
server.description: Read-only discovery surface for Prasad Gade's portfolio. The site publishes static JSON resources and discovery metadata on GitHub Pages, and does not currently expose a live JSON-RPC MCP transport.

prasadgade_portfolio.name: Prasad Gade Portfolio Static Discovery
prasadgade_portfolio.description: Discovery landing page for the read-only portfolio resources published on prasadgade.dev. Use the listed HTTPS JSON endpoints directly.

resources.name: agent_page
resources.description: Landing page for the site's public agent-facing discovery files.

resources.name: openapi
resources.description: OpenAPI description of the static JSON API.

resources.name: webmcp_manifest
resources.description: WebMCP manifest for the same read-only tool catalog.

resources.name: agents_directory
resources.description: Agent directory that lists the site's public discovery surface.

tools.name: get_resume
tools.description: Get Prasad Gade's primary resume data with education, experience, projects, skills, certifications, and achievements.

tools.name: get_resume_master
tools.description: Get Prasad Gade's detailed master resume with broader background, publications, leadership, and the same public project set.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Get all public portfolio projects with descriptions, tech stacks, metrics, demo links, and source links.

tools.name: get_skills
tools.description: Get categorized technical skills across programming, data science, web development, databases, and DevOps.

tools.name: get_social
tools.description: Get contact information and public social profile links for Prasad Gade.

tools.name: get_about
tools.description: Get personality, hobbies, interests, favorite media, and the site philosophy behind this portfolio.
